message:
Add Dicklesworthstone stack installer library (scripts/lib/stack.sh)

Implements modular installation for all 8 Dicklesworthstone tools:
- install_ntm(): Named Tmux Manager (agent orchestration)
- install_mcp_agent_mail(): Agent coordination server
- install_ubs(): Ultimate Bug Scanner
- install_bv(): Beads Viewer (task management TUI)
- install_cass(): Coding Agent Session Search
- install_cm(): CASS Memory System
- install_caam(): Coding Agent Account Manager
- install_slb(): Simultaneous Launch Button

Features:
- Idempotent (checks if already installed)
- Configurable installer URLs and commands
- verify_stack(): Comprehensive installation verification
- verify_stack_help(): Tests --help for all tools
- get_stack_versions(): Version reporting for doctor output

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.4","title":"Create shell setup library (scripts/lib/zsh.sh)","description":"# Task: Create Shell Setup Library

## Description
Build a library to install and configure the complete shell environment.

## Components
1. zsh installation
2. Oh My Zsh installation
3. Powerlevel10k theme
4. Plugins installation
5. ACFS zshrc deployment

## Functions

```bash
install_zsh()              # apt install zsh
install_oh_my_zsh()        # Official installer
install_powerlevel10k()    # Clone to custom themes
install_zsh_plugins()      # Clone plugins
deploy_acfs_zshrc()        # Copy acfs.zshrc
configure_zshrc()          # Set up loader
```

## Plugins to Install
- zsh-autosuggestions
- zsh-syntax-highlighting
- docker
- docker-compose
- sudo
- colored-man-pages
- command-not-found
- git (built-in)

## File Layout
```
~/.acfs/
├── zsh/
│   └── acfs.zshrc     # Main config
└── ...

~/.zshrc                # Tiny loader
~/.zshrc.local          # User overrides (touch)
~/.p10k.zsh             # Theme config
```

## zshrc Loader Content
```bash
# ACFS loader
source "$HOME/.acfs/zsh/acfs.zshrc"
[ -f "$HOME/.zshrc.local" ] && source "$HOME/.zshrc.local"
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] zsh installed and working
- [ ] Oh My Zsh installed
- [ ] Powerlevel10k theme active
- [ ] All plugins installed
- [ ] acfs.zshrc deployed
- [ ] Loader .zshrc in place
- [ ] User overrides supported","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:55.348206-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346999-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346999-05:00","close_reason":"Files created in previous session: scripts/lib/logging.sh, os_detect.sh, user.sh, zsh.sh, and install.sh with all 8 phases","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.4","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:55.350105-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.5","title":"Create language runtimes installer (scripts/lib/languages.sh)","description":"# Task: Create Language Runtimes Installer

## Description
Build a library to install all required language runtimes.

## Languages to Install

### Bun
```bash
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
```
- Add to PATH: ~/.bun/bin
- Install completions

### uv (Python)
```bash
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
```
- Installs to ~/.local/bin
- Set UV_LINK_MODE=copy

### Rust
```bash
curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y
```
- Adds ~/.cargo/bin to PATH
- Non-interactive install

### Go
```bash
sudo apt install -y golang-go
```
- Or latest from go.dev if needed

## Functions

```bash
install_bun()     # Bun runtime
install_uv()      # uv Python tooling
install_rust()    # Rust + cargo
install_go()      # Go toolchain
verify_languages() # Check all installed
```

## Verification

```bash
bun --version
uv --version
cargo --version
go version
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 languages installed
- [ ] All in PATH
- [ ] Verification commands pass
- [ ] Idempotent (safe to run twice)
- [ ] Works on arm64 and amd64","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:06.994349-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T11:53:59.789783-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T11:53:59.789783-05:00","close_reason":"Created scripts/lib/languages.sh with install_bun, install_uv, install_rust, install_go, and verify_languages functions.  {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.6","title":"Create coding agents installer (scripts/lib/agents.sh)","description":"# Task: Create Coding Agents Installer

## Description
Build a library to install the three coding agent CLIs.

## Agents to Install

### Claude Code
```bash
# Official installer (check docs for latest)
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
# Or via installer script
```
- Installs to ~/.local/bin/claude
- Requires login after install

### Codex CLI (OpenAI)
```bash
bun install -g @openai/codex@latest
```
- Installed via bun global
- Requires API key or login

### Gemini CLI (Google)
```bash
bun install -g @google/gemini-cli@latest
```
- Installed via bun global
- Requires login

## Aliases
These are set in acfs.zshrc:
```bash
alias cc='NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=32768" ENABLE_BACKGROUND_TASKS=1 claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'
alias cod='codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox -m gpt-5.2-codex -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" -c model_reasoning_summary_format=experimental --enable web_search_request'
alias gmi='gemini --yolo --model gemini-3-pro-preview'
```

## Functions

```bash
install_claude_code()  # Install Claude CLI
install_codex_cli()    # Install Codex CLI
install_gemini_cli()   # Install Gemini CLI
verify_agents()        # Check all installed
```

## Note
These require login after install - that happens in onboarding.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 3 agents installed
- [ ] Commands available in PATH
- [ ] Aliases configured in zshrc
- [ ] Verification commands work
- [ ] Clear message about login requirement","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:22.66693-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T11:56:10.596544-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T11:56:10.596544-05:00","close_reason":"Created scripts/lib/agents.sh with install_claude_code, install_codex_cli, install_gemini_cli, and verify_agents functions. Requires bun. Idempotent and follows established patterns.","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.6","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:22.668571-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

## Description
Build a library to install all 8 Dicklesworthstone tools.

## Tools to Install (in order)

### 1. NTM (Named Tmux Manager)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/main/install.sh | bash
```
- Agent orchestration cockpit
- Verify: `ntm --help`

### 2. MCP Agent Mail
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail/main/scripts/install.sh | bash -s -- --yes
```
- Agent coordination server
- Verify: `command -v am`

### 3. Ultimate Bug Scanner (UBS)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh | bash -s -- --easy-mode
```
- Bug scanning with guardrails
- Verify: `ubs --help`

### 4. Beads Viewer (BV)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/main/install.sh | bash
```
- Task management TUI
- Verify: `bv --help`

### 5. CASS (Coding Agent Session Search)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/main/install.sh | bash -s -- --easy-mode --verify
```
- Unified session search
- Verify: `cass --help`

### 6. CM (CASS Memory System)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/main/install.sh | bash -s -- --easy-mode --verify
```
- Procedural memory for agents
- Verify: `cm --version`

### 7. CAAM (Coding Agent Account Manager)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/main/install.sh | bash
```
- Auth switching
- Verify: `caam --help`

### 8. SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
```
- Two-person rule for dangerous commands
- Verify: `slb --help`

## Functions

```bash
install_ntm()
install_mcp_agent_mail()
install_ubs()
install_bv()
install_cass()
install_cm()
install_caam()
install_slb()
verify_stack()  # Check all 8 installed
```

- [ ] All commands in PATH

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.8","title":"Create main install.sh orchestrator","description":"# Task: Create Main install.sh Orchestrator

## Description
Build the main installer script that orchestrates all phases.

## Script Structure

```bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Parse arguments
parse_args() {
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case $1 in
            --yes) ACFS_AUTO_APPROVE=1 ;;
            --mode) ACFS_MODE="$2"; shift ;;
            --dry-run) ACFS_DRY_RUN=1 ;;
            --quiet) ACFS_QUIET=1 ;;
            --verbose) ACFS_VERBOSE=1 ;;
            *) log_error "Unknown option: $1"; exit 1 ;;
        esac
        shift
    done
}

# Main phases
main() {
    log_step "0/8" "Preflight checks"
    source_libs
    validate_os
    
    log_step "1/8" "Setting up ubuntu user"
    ensure_ubuntu_user
    setup_passwordless_sudo
    
    log_step "2/8" "Creating workspace"
    create_workspace
    
    log_step "3/8" "Installing shell environment"
    install_zsh_environment
    
    log_step "4/8" "Installing languages"
    install_languages
    
    log_step "5/8" "Installing dev tools"
    install_dev_tools
    
    log_step "6/8" "Installing coding agents"
    install_agents
    
    log_step "7/8" "Installing Dicklesworthstone stack"
    install_stack
    
    log_step "8/8" "Final configuration"
    deploy_configs
    install_onboard
    
    print_completion_message
}

main "$@"
```

## Error Handling
- Trap errors with helpful message
- Log to file before exit
- Suggest running acfs doctor

## Checkpointing
- Write completed phases to ~/.acfs/state.json
- Skip completed phases on re-run
- Support --force to re-run all

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 8 phases implemented
- [ ] Clean error handling
- [ ] Checkpointing works
- [ ] --dry-run mode
- [ ] Completion message with next steps
- [ ] Works as root or ubuntu","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:56.003488-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.347345-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.347345-05:00","close_reason":"Files created in previous session: scripts/lib/logging.sh, os_detect.sh, user.sh, zsh.sh, and install.sh with all 8 phases","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.8","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:56.005402-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.9","title":"Create clean canonical acfs.zshrc","description":"# Task: Create Clean Canonical acfs.zshrc

## Description
Create the production-ready zshrc that ACFS deploys to VPS.

## File: acfs/zsh/acfs.zshrc

## Requirements
Based on user's original zshrc but:
- Remove duplicate PATH/Bun blocks
- Remove duplicate aliases
- Use safe chpwd hook instead of overriding cd()
- Fix atuin path before init ordering
- Conditional tool aliases (only if tool exists)
- Support user overrides via ~/.zshrc.local

## Structure

```bash
# ~/.acfs/zsh/acfs.zshrc
# ACFS canonical zsh config (managed)

# --- SSH guard ---
# Prevent weird terminal settings over SSH

# --- Paths (early) ---
# ~/.local/bin, ~/.cargo/bin, go, bun, atuin

# --- Oh My Zsh ---
# Theme: powerlevel10k
# Plugins: git, autosuggestions, syntax-highlighting, etc.

# --- Editor preference ---
# vim over SSH, nvim locally

# --- Modern CLI aliases ---
# Only set if tool exists
# lsd/eza, bat, fd, rg, dust, btop, nvim, lazygit

# --- Git aliases ---
# gs, gd, gdc, gp, gpu, gco, gcm, gca, gb, glog

# --- Docker aliases ---
# dc, dps, dpsa, dimg, dex

# --- Directory shortcuts ---
# dev, proj, dots, p

# --- Custom functions ---
# mkcd, extract

# --- Safe ls after cd ---
# Using chpwd hook, not overriding cd()

# --- Tool settings ---
# UV_LINK_MODE, etc.

# --- Tool initializations ---
# cargo, atuin, zoxide, direnv, fzf

# --- Agent aliases ---
# cc, cod, gmi (dangerous mode enabled)

# --- Keybindings ---
# Ctrl/Alt+Arrow for word movement
# Home/End keys
# Force atuin Ctrl-R
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No duplicate code
- [ ] All tools alias only if present
- [ ] chpwd hook works correctly
- [ ] Atuin Ctrl-R works
- [ ] Local overrides supported
- [ ] Passes shellcheck","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:27:40.519614-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:27:40.519614-05:00","labels":["config","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.9","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:27:40.521482-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5vz","title":"Add installer security verification","description":"# Task: Add Installer Security Verification

## Description
Make the curl|bash pattern more trustworthy.

## Features

### 1. Checksum Verification
Before running sub-installers, verify checksums:
```bash
verify_checksum() {
    local url="$1"
    local expected_sha256="$2"
    local content=$(curl -fsSL "$url")
    local actual=$(echo "$content" | sha256sum | cut -d' ' -f1)
    if [[ "$actual" != "$expected_sha256" ]]; then
        log_error "Checksum mismatch for $url"
        exit 1
    fi
    echo "$content"
}
```

### 2. HTTPS Enforcement
All URLs must be HTTPS. Fail on HTTP.

### 3. --print Mode
Show exactly what will be downloaded:
```bash
install.sh --print
# Outputs:
# Will download:
# - https://bun.sh/install (sha256: abc123...)
# - https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh (sha256: def456...)
# ...
```

### 4. Source Links
Website shows link to install.sh source on GitHub.

### 5. Changelog
What changed since last version.

## Checksums File
```yaml
# checksums.yaml
installers:
  bun: "abc123..."
  uv: "def456..."
  # etc
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Checksum verification for key installers
- [ ] HTTPS enforced
- [ ] --print mode works
- [ ] Website links to source","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:39:05.141855-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:39:05.141855-05:00","labels":["installer","security","task"]}

@@ -0,0 +1,427 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# ============================================================
+# ACFS Installer - Dicklesworthstone Stack Library
+# Installs all 8 Dicklesworthstone tools
+# ============================================================
+
+# Ensure we have logging functions available
+if [[ -z "${ACFS_BLUE:-}" ]]; then
+    SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+    # shellcheck source=logging.sh
+    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/logging.sh"
+fi
+
+# ============================================================
+# Configuration
+# ============================================================
+
+# Tool installer URLs (with cache busting where needed)
+declare -A STACK_URLS=(
+    [ntm]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/main/install.sh"
+    [mcp_agent_mail]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail/main/scripts/install.sh"
+    [ubs]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh"
+    [bv]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/main/install.sh"
+    [cass]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/main/install.sh"
+    [cm]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/main/install.sh"
+    [caam]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/main/install.sh"
+    [slb]="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/simultaneous_launch_button/main/scripts/install.sh"
+)
+
+# Tool commands for verification
+declare -A STACK_COMMANDS=(
+    [ntm]="ntm"
+    [mcp_agent_mail]="am"
+    [ubs]="ubs"
+    [bv]="bv"
+    [cass]="cass"
+    [cm]="cm"
+    [caam]="caam"
+    [slb]="slb"
+)
+
+# Tool display names
+declare -A STACK_NAMES=(
+    [ntm]="NTM (Named Tmux Manager)"
+    [mcp_agent_mail]="MCP Agent Mail"
+    [ubs]="Ultimate Bug Scanner"
+    [bv]="Beads Viewer"
+    [cass]="CASS (Coding Agent Session Search)"
+    [cm]="CM (CASS Memory System)"
+    [caam]="CAAM (Coding Agent Account Manager)"
+    [slb]="SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button)"
+)
+
+# ============================================================
+# Helper Functions
+# ============================================================
+
+# Check if a command exists
+_stack_command_exists() {
+    command -v "$1" &>/dev/null
+}
+
+# Get the sudo command if needed
+_stack_get_sudo() {
+    if [[ $EUID -eq 0 ]]; then
+        echo ""
+    else
+        echo "sudo"
+    fi
+}
+
+# Run a command as target user
+_stack_run_as_user() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local cmd="$1"
+
+    if [[ "$(whoami)" == "$target_user" ]]; then
+        bash -c "$cmd"
+    else
+        $(_stack_get_sudo) -u "$target_user" -H bash -c "$cmd"
+    fi
+}
+
+# Run an installer script from URL as target user
+_stack_run_installer() {
+    local url="$1"
+    local args="${2:-}"
+    local cache_bust="${3:-false}"
+
+    # Add cache busting timestamp if requested
+    if [[ "$cache_bust" == "true" ]]; then
+        url="${url}?$(date +%s)"
+    fi
+
+    _stack_run_as_user "curl -fsSL '$url' 2>/dev/null | bash -s -- $args"
+}
+
+# Check if a stack tool is installed
+_stack_is_installed() {
+    local tool="$1"
+    local cmd="${STACK_COMMANDS[$tool]}"
+
+    if [[ -z "$cmd" ]]; then
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Check in common locations
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+
+    # Check PATH
+    if _stack_command_exists "$cmd"; then
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    # Check user's local bin
+    if [[ -x "$target_home/.local/bin/$cmd" ]]; then
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    # Check user's bin
+    if [[ -x "$target_home/bin/$cmd" ]]; then
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    return 1
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Individual Tool Installers
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install NTM (Named Tmux Manager)
+# Agent orchestration cockpit
+install_ntm() {
+    local tool="ntm"
+
+    if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+        log_detail "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} already installed"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing ${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}..."
+
+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}"; then
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"
+            return 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    log_warn "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installation may have failed"
+    return 1
+}
+
+# Install MCP Agent Mail
+# Agent coordination server
+install_mcp_agent_mail() {
+    local tool="mcp_agent_mail"
+
+    if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+        log_detail "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} already installed"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing ${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}..."
+
+    # MCP Agent Mail uses --yes for non-interactive install
+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}" "--yes" "true"; then
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"
+            return 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    log_warn "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installation may have failed"
+    return 1
+}
+
+# Install Ultimate Bug Scanner (UBS)
+# Bug scanning with guardrails
+install_ubs() {
+    local tool="ubs"
+
+    if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+        log_detail "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} already installed"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing ${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}..."
+
+    # UBS uses --easy-mode for simplified setup
+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}" "--easy-mode" "true"; then
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"
+            return 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    log_warn "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installation may have failed"
+    return 1
+}
+
+# Install Beads Viewer (BV)

+install_bv() {

+

+

+
+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}" "" "true"; then

+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"
+            return 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    log_warn "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installation may have failed"

+}
+
+# Install CASS (Coding Agent Session Search)

+install_cass() {

+

+        return 0

+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}" "--easy-mode --verify"; then

+}

+

+        return 0

+

+

+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}" "--easy-mode --verify"; then

+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"

+        fi

+

+}
+
+# Install CAAM (Coding Agent Account Manager)
+# Auth switching
+install_caam() {
+    local tool="caam"
+
+    if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+        log_detail "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} already installed"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing ${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}..."
+
+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}" "" "true"; then
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"
+            return 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    log_warn "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installation may have failed"
+    return 1
+}
+
+# Install SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button)
+# Two-person rule for dangerous commands
+install_slb() {
+    local tool="slb"
+
+    if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+        log_detail "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} already installed"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing ${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}..."
+
+    if _stack_run_installer "${STACK_URLS[$tool]}"; then
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            log_success "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installed"
+            return 0

+    fi
+
+    log_warn "${STACK_NAMES[$tool]} installation may have failed"
+    return 1
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Verification Functions
+# ============================================================
+
+# Verify all stack tools are installed
+verify_stack() {
+    local all_pass=true
+    local installed_count=0
+    local total_count=${#STACK_COMMANDS[@]}
+
+    log_detail "Verifying Dicklesworthstone stack..."
+
+    for tool in ntm mcp_agent_mail ubs bv cass cm caam slb; do
+        local cmd="${STACK_COMMANDS[$tool]}"
+        local name="${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}"
+
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            log_detail "  $cmd: installed"
+            ((installed_count++))
+        else
+            log_warn "  Missing: $cmd ($name)"
+            all_pass=false
+        fi
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$all_pass" == "true" ]]; then
+        log_success "All $total_count stack tools verified"
+        return 0
+    else
+        log_warn "Stack: $installed_count/$total_count tools installed"
+        return 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# Check if stack tools respond to --help
+verify_stack_help() {
+    local failures=()
+
+    log_detail "Testing stack tools --help..."
+
+    for tool in ntm mcp_agent_mail ubs bv cass cm caam slb; do
+        local cmd="${STACK_COMMANDS[$tool]}"
+
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            if ! _stack_run_as_user "$cmd --help >/dev/null 2>&1"; then
+                failures+=("$cmd")
+            fi
+        fi
+    done
+
+    if [[ ${#failures[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
+        log_warn "Stack tools --help failed: ${failures[*]}"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    log_success "All stack tools respond to --help"
+    return 0
+}
+
+# Get versions of installed stack tools (for doctor output)
+get_stack_versions() {
+    echo "Dicklesworthstone Stack Versions:"
+
+    for tool in ntm mcp_agent_mail ubs bv cass cm caam slb; do
+        local cmd="${STACK_COMMANDS[$tool]}"
+        local name="${STACK_NAMES[$tool]}"
+
+        if _stack_is_installed "$tool"; then
+            local version
+            version=$(_stack_run_as_user "$cmd --version 2>/dev/null" || echo "installed")
+            echo "  $cmd: $version"
+        fi
+    done
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Main Installation Function
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install all stack tools (called by install.sh)
+install_all_stack() {
+    log_step "7/8" "Installing Dicklesworthstone stack..."
+
+    # Install in recommended order
+    install_ntm
+    install_mcp_agent_mail
+    install_ubs
+    install_bv
+    install_cass
+    install_cm
+    install_caam
+    install_slb
+
+    # Verify installation
+    verify_stack
+
+    log_success "Dicklesworthstone stack installation complete"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Module can be sourced or run directly
+# ============================================================
+
+# If run directly (not sourced), execute main function
+if [[ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" == "${0}" ]]; then
+    install_all_stack "$@"
+fi
